repos.name: GitNexus
repos.description_original: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
repos.description_cn: 一款 TypeScript 打造的AI Agent 框架，支持构建自主决策的智能体应用，今日热度爆棚
repos.domain: AI Agent 智能体 / 检索增强生成 (RAG)
repos.target_audience: AI 应用开发者、自动化工程师
repos.problem_solved: 构建自主决策的 AI 智能体

repos.name: gallery
repos.description_original: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
repos.description_cn: 一款基于 Kotlin 开发的AI 模型，今日新增 897 星，今日热度爆棚
repos.target_audience: AI 开发者和研究人员
repos.problem_solved: 快速上手 AI 相关开发
